scripts.dev:full: concurrently --kill-others --names WEB,API,SWA "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:swa"
scripts.dev:swa: wait-on http://127.0.0.1:5173 http-get://127.0.0.1:7071/api/health && swa start http://127.0.0.1:5173 --api-devserver-url http://127.0.0.1:7071 --swa-config-location public
